name: PostgreSQL Error Extraction
description: A PostgreSQL-backed inventory system displays verbose error messages. Use CAST() type conversion errors to exfiltrate the flag one piece at a time.
briefing: PartsBin, a warehouse inventory system running on PostgreSQL, leaks full error messages on the warehouse lookup page. UNION queries are blocked by a simple filter, but you can abuse PostgreSQL's strict type casting — forcing a string value into an integer via CAST() generates an error message that includes the string. The 'admin_config' table contains the flag.
objective: Use PostgreSQL CAST() error-based injection to extract the flag from the admin_config table via error messages.
author: h4ck0rman
